div.p: User Query "What mutations stabilize lysozyme? Analyze PDB 1LYZ"
1. Parse Query Extract PDB IDs via regex Match protein names from dictionary Detect drug keywords
2. Resolve Proteins UniProt search by name Get PDB structure mappings Deduplicate all IDs
6. Synthesis + Experiment Suggestions Combine literature + structural evidence Generate prioritized experiment plan Build final research report
3. Literature Search PubMed general query Protein-specific search Score relevance Extract key findings
4. Structure Analysis Fetch PDB file from RCSB Run NMA (100 modes) Identify flex/rigid regions Find hinge residues
5. Drug Discovery (skipped if no drug keywords) Search ChEMBL by target Classify potency Find approved drugs
15 papers found 5 mention stability 3 mention mutations
